text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
One day at a local festival, I chance<n>upon Narita
Brian trying her luck at the<n>shooting gallery.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Got it.

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text:
A-another one?! That's insane!<n>She's going to
get all the prizes at<n>this rate!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Hmph.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Very impressive. Now that I think of it,<n>you were a
good shot even when we<n>were little.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Nah, you were just bad.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Perhaps... but...

text_block_list.name: Young Brian
text_block_list.text:
Ha! Another clean hit! Next up is that<n>colossal
beast!

text_block_list.name: Young Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Ugh... Why won't this piggy bank<n>fall?! I need to
hit it in a different spot!<n>One more shot!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I wasn't even trying for difficult<n>prizes... Yet you
would get prize after<n>prize despite only aiming for
the big<n>ones.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
That's because you think too much.<n>Distance
this, angle that... Ever since<n>you were little, you
always overwork<n>that big brain of yours.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me?! Are you saying my<n>head is overly
large?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Pipe down, will you? I'm trying to<n>take down my
last target.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Taking down your target isn't a<n>matter of... logic.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
You gotta sniff out their weak spot<n>with your
instincts...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: And then fire!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The bullet flies through the air and<n>topples the
prize in spectacular<n>fashion.

text_block_list.name: Game Operator
text_block_list.text:
Man, not my best day of business...<n>Well, life's
full of ups and downs.<n>Feel free to take home all
the prizes<n>you shot down.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Keep them. I'm only interested in the<n>hunt.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Although, I will be taking that last<n>one.

text_block_list.name: Game Operator
text_block_list.text:
You're really okay with just that? In<n>that case,
drop by anytime!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Here you go, Big Sis... Take it.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: What's gotten into you all of a<n>sudden?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
This is... a piggy bank? It looks...<n>strangely
familiar...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Wait, Brian, is this...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Well, I'm off.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Hehe... You're quite the sister.
